name: agent-relay
description: File-queue collaboration workflows for delegating scoped tasks across Claude Code and Codex CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate scoped work to local AI workers
interface.longDescription: Use file queues and durable reports to coordinate Claude Code and Codex CLI workers while preserving lead-agent review gates.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this scoped task to a worker and review its report.
Split this work across independent workers without overlapping edits.
